testcase.name: CourseList Component > renders loading state initially, then displays the course table
CourseList Component > allows a user to add a new course
testcase.system-out: I saved the courses--now, to update the fields.

testcase.name: CourseList Component > allows a user to delete a course
CourseList Component > allows a user to edit a course
CourseList Component > allows a user to add a student to a course
StudentList Component > renders loading state initially, then displays the student table
StudentList Component > allows a user to add a new student
testcase.system-out: I saved the students--now, to update the fields.

testcase.name: StudentList Component > allows a user to delete a student
StudentList Component > allows a user to edit a student
CourseService > getAllCourses > returns a list of courses on success
CourseService > getAllCourses > throws an error when the response is not ok
CourseService > addStudentToCourse > sends a PUT request and returns success message
CourseService > addStudentToCourse > throws an error with the server message if course is full
CourseService > removeStudentFromCourse > sends a PUT request and returns success message
CourseService > getEnrollmentCount > returns the number of students
CourseService > getEnrollmentCount > returns -1 if the response is not ok
CourseService > addCourse > sends a POST request and returns a string message
CourseService > updateCourse > sends a PUT request with the updated course data
CourseService > deleteCourse > sends a DELETE request
StudentService > getAllStudents > sends a GET request and returns a list of students
StudentService > createStudent > sends a POST request and returns a JSON message object
StudentService > addStudent > sends a POST request and returns a string message
StudentService > updateStudent > sends a PUT request with the updated student data
StudentService > deleteStudent > sends a DELETE request for the specified ID
